title: The battery shaves the import peak above the grid limit
description: A charging station draws 10 kW but the peak-shaving grid limit is 5 kW. The grid supplies the 5 kW cap and the battery discharges the remaining 5 kW, so the station still gets its full load — the part above the limit comes from the battery, not from curtailing the load. The battery is staged to 50% SoC so it can discharge. No PV/house/weather, so it is deterministic under `dale dev --stepped`.

steps.label: Run several manager + battery cycles (40 s of virtual time)
The station still draws its full 10 kW (not curtailed)
The battery discharges the 5 kW above the grid limit

judge.text: Grid import holds at the 5 kW peak limit; the battery covers the 5 kW above it (peak shaving) and the station is NOT curtailed.
